_doc: Adversarial QA reconciliation of the IL-GP denominator duplicate conflict (48 exact-audit vs 87/79 pressure-test). READ-ONLY, NO DB writes. Unit = physical door = building x distinct phone; phone-subgrouping lets a dup PAIR collapse while a co-tenant on a different phone is KEPT.
method: union-find buildings across all 3 source cluster lists; within each building sub-group rows by door key (phone>owner-NPI>EIN>surname); excess=rows-distinct_doors; same phone across different house numbers is NOT collapsed (multi-office group kept).

verdict_legend.collapse_safe: all rows share one door (phone/owner) at one house number -> single physical GP location; collapse corrects the overcount.
verdict_legend.collapse_partial: multitenant building containing a genuine dup subgroup; collapse ONLY that subgroup, KEEP the other distinct-phone doors.
verdict_legend.keep_multitenant: distinct doors, no dup subgroup -> separate practices in one building; collapsing would ERASE a real independent. DO NOT collapse.
verdict_legend.verify: same phone spans different house numbers (possible multi-office dentist_multi group) -> confirm before any collapse; counted as 0 excess here.

summary.note: defensible_excess counts ONLY collapse_safe + collapse_partial dup-subgroups confirmed by shared door identity. 'verify' rows excluded from the excess until confirmed.

reconciliation_of_48_vs_87: The 48 audit clusters require shared PHONE+streetcore (strict, all 2-row). The pressure-test 87-excess/79-cluster set loosens to address+phone-OR-EIN and adds 3-row buildings, but its own conclusion already KEEPS 103 multitenant clusters. Re-deriving from DB door identity, the defensible collapse is 75 rows (~1.69%): MOST of the audit's 48 are confirmed, a handful of 3-row pressure-test buildings are multitenant (collapse only the dup subgroup), and same-phone/different-building pairs are held as possible multi-office groups. Neither raw 48 nor raw 87 is correct as a blind collapse.

names: THE DENTAL MASTRS OF RAVENSWOOD LLC

clusters.ao_or_tier_overlap_flag: SHAFI_AO_network (1137 Eola Aurora) — denominator collapse here must be coordinated with the AO ownership census so the same physical Ashton office is not double-counted across numerator(AO) and denominator(dup)

names: ORA DENTAL STUDIO WEST LOOP LLC
RUSSELL J. CECALA, D.D.S., M.S., LTD DBA PERIOCARE
SONRISA CAPITATION CCHC PROFESSIONAL CORPORATION SONRISA FAMILY DENTAL
DR. ZORAN D. STOJANOVIC & ASSOCIATES, LTD
MODERN DENTAL OF LOGAN SQUARE LLC

pressure_test_enumeration_gap.verdict: The pressure-test 87/79 figure is HALF-UNVERIFIABLE: 39 of its 79 claimed clusters were never written to disk (no location_ids), so they cannot be reviewed. Do NOT treat 87 as a confirmed collapse target. Re-run the pressure test with full cluster enumeration before trusting the extra 39.

qa_caveats.coverage: This review covers the 73 building components reconstructable from the UNION of audit(48)+pressure-enumerated(40)+reconciliation(48). The 39 un-enumerated pressure-test clusters are out of reach.
qa_caveats.flag_only: FLAG-ONLY. No rows were collapsed and no DB write was performed (out of this lane). The defensible_excess (75, 1.69%) is the recommended ceiling for a future, separately-authorized duplicate_location collapse — and only after the verify/partial flags below are resolved.

ao_or_tier_overlaps.flag: SHAFI_AO_network (1137 Eola Aurora) — denominator collapse here must be coordinated with the AO ownership census so the same physical Ashton office is not double-counted across numerator(AO) and denominator(dup)

qa_caveats.denominator_is_sound: Both source analyses and this review agree the IL GP denominator (~4,439) is SOUND — the duplicate excess is ~1.7%, NOT a material inflation. The ownership-census NUMERATOR (detector coverage), not the denominator, remains the main driver of the corporate %.

tier_contradictions_at_dup_addresses.finding: Wave-1 ownership_tier was written per NPI/DA row, not per deduped physical location. At collapse_safe duplicate addresses the two rows of ONE practice received CONFLICTING tiers. This both (a) double-counts those practices in any tier tally and (b) makes the tier ambiguous. Reinforces the standing rule: do NOT trust the existing ownership_tier rows as final, and do NOT use ownership_tier IS NULL as canonical remaining-work. These must be reconciled to one tier per door before any headline census %.

rows.note: SAME physical door (shared phone/owner) carries DIFFERENT ownership_tier on its duplicate rows — at least one wave-1 classification is wrong; resolve to ONE tier when the dup is collapsed.
